title: SQL JOINS Workshop
headline: Stop Guessing Which JOIN to Use - Start Knowing
subheadline: A live, hands-on workshop where you'll write, debug and master all 6 types of SQL JOINs across real-world scenarios.
painPoints: You know INNER JOIN works... but LEFT, RIGHT and FULL OUTER all blur together
Your query drops rows - and you have no idea why
Once three or more tables are involved, you're guessing rather than reasoning
You've memorised the syntax but you can't confidently explain what the result actually means
transformation: Pick the right JOIN type instantly for any scenario - no more trial and error
Write multi-table queries across 3, 4 or more tables without losing the thread
Trace exactly why a row is included or excluded from your results
Write joins that are clean, correct and built with performance in mind
whatYouWillDo: Build all 6 JOIN types (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER, CROSS, SELF) from scratch on real datasets
Work through multi-table queries involving orders, customers, products and more
Analyse real results and explain why specific rows appear or disappear
Spot and fix broken joins through live guided exercises and corrections
Apply best practices and performance considerations when writing joins in production
prerequisites: You should be comfortable writing basic SELECT queries with WHERE clauses. You don't need to know Joins already - that's exactly what we'll cover. Access to Database will be provided during the workshop.
whyDifferent: Every concept is coded live on real data - not presented on slides you'll forget tomorrow
Hands-on exercises after each topic, with live corrections so you understand exactly where you went wrong
The sandbox database stays available after the workshop - keep practising on the same real data
Recordings stay accessible for a period so you can revisit any explanation at your own pace
Cheatsheets provided - a practical reference you'll keep opening long after the last session
Maximum 15 participants so you get real attention, real answers and real feedback - not a seat in a crowd
Delivered in a mix of Mauritian Creole and English - designed so the concepts actually stick
A badge to showcase your new skills on LinkedIn and get noticed by employers

instructor.name: Mehfooz Kausmally
instructor.description: A seasoned software professional from Mauritius with over a decade of experience in the IT industry. After a successful career as a developer in multinational companies working extensively with complex databases and backend systems, Mehfooz transitioned into full-time professional coaching. He has already guided over 270 engineers across different technologies and levels - bringing real-world expertise and a practical, hands-on approach into every session.
